description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the giomasce/testenv Docker image with GIT_DEPTH=3, GIT_STRATEGY=clone and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive variables and two stages: build and test. Add a before_script that prints /proc/cpuinfo and /proc/meminfo, runs apt-get update and installs eatmydata. In the build stage define a build job (tag docker) that installs make, nasm, python3 and qemu-utils via eatmydata apt-get, executes bash test/build_all_variants.sh, lists the generated executables, and publishes the artifacts directory as an artifact. In the test stage add ipxe, mm0, mm0_c, single_cream and tests jobs (tag privileged) each installing python3 and qemu-system-x86 via eatmydata, then running qemu-system-i386 on the respective artifacts/*.qcow2 image with 256 M memory, no display, KVM enabled, piping stdout to ./test/decode_tests.py (using the just_malloc argument for all except the tests job). Mark the mm0 and single_cream jobs as allow_failure and run the ipxe job with an additional background HTTP server started by python3 -m http.server 8080.
